Web Developer.description: Builds and maintains websites and web applications.

Full Stack Developer.description: Works on both frontend and backend of web applications.

Data Scientist.description: Analyzes data to extract insights and build predictive models.

Data Analyst.description: Interprets data and creates reports to support business decisions.

Machine Learning Engineer.description: Designs and deploys machine learning models into production.

UI/UX Designer.description: Designs user interfaces and experiences for digital products.

Backend Developer.description: Builds server side logic, databases and APIs.

DevOps Engineer.description: Manages infrastructure, deployment pipelines and cloud services.

Android Developer.description: Builds mobile applications for Android devices.

Project Manager.description: Plans, executes and oversees technology projects.
